name: module-runner-server
description: Interactive local runner for testing portable backend modules.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/cli/selectModule.js && node --check src/modules/discoverModules.js && node --check src/modules/loadModule.js && node --check src/modules/moduleRoutes.js && node --check src/http/createServer.js && node --check src/http/markdown.js && node --check src/http/renderAppPage.js && node --check src/http/renderModuleInfo.js && node --check src/http/requestSender.js && node --check src/http/response.js
